ENGNew: Directive from the Chief of Police
changeReason: Improved translation from Japanese. Old: "Notice From the Police Chief"

Old translation misinterprets the document reference number as an addressee ('To departments 1 through 12'); new translation correctly identifies it as a directive number ('General Affairs Division, Directive No. 1-12').

TextENGNew: To all police station chiefs and facility managers:
changeReason: Old translation uses 'chief constable' (a British rank); new correctly translates 各警察署長 as 'all police station chiefs,' which refers to the heads of individual police stations.
'Notice' changed to 'Directive' for 通達, which more accurately conveys the mandatory, top-down nature of the communication.

TextENGNew: As certain media outlets have already reported on the recent incidents in Hinamizawa Village, Shishibone City,
public curiosity has been drawn to the area, causing serious repercussions for the daily lives of local residents. This has become a matter of grave concern.
changeReason: Old translation says 'global attention,' which overstates the Japanese 世間の好奇の目 (public curiosity); new translation correctly renders this as 'public curiosity.'

TextENGNew: In order to protect the livelihood and property of the residents, the following directives are hereby issued.
changeReason: Old translation mistranslates 財産 as 'prosperity' when it means 'property'; new translation correctly uses 'property.'

TextENGNew: Hinamizawa Village housewife murder case (Occurred June 23rd)
Hinamizawa Village student disappearance case (Occurred June 24th)
Hinamizawa Village construction site foreman murder case (Occurred June 22nd)

changeReason: Old translation truncates '白川署' to 'Shira station'; new translation correctly renders the full name as 'Shirakawa Station.'

TextENGNew: Shirakawa Natural Park falling incident (Occurred June 23rd)
Hinamizawa Village Shinto priest’s wife disappearance case (Occurred June 23rd)
(3) Request for Media Restraint to All Relevant Organizations
See attached sheet for the responsible police station.

changeReason: Old translates 警務部 as generic 'Police Department'; new correctly translates it as 'Police Administration Division,' a specific organizational unit.
